name: Garithes Yiouvetsi ( Baked Prawns )
recipeInstructions:
Serves: 6 Oven temperature: 250 C (500 F) Cooking time: 50 minutes
1. Shell the prawns, leaving the last segment of shell and tail intact. De-vein and rinse.
2. Drain and dry with paper towels; refrigerate until ready to use.
3. In a pan, gently fry onion in oil until transparent. Add spring onions and garlic; cook for 2 minutes longer.
4. Add tomatoes, white wine, most of the parsley, rigani or oregano, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Cover and simmer gently for 30 minutes until thick.
6. Spoon half of the tomato sauce into six individual oven dishes or one large dish.
7. Arrange prawns on top; cover with remaining sauce.
8. Coarsely crumble feta cheese and sprinkle over the prawns.
9. Bake in a very hot oven for 10-12 minutes until prawns are pink and feta is melted and lightly browned.
10. Sprinkle with remaining parsley and serve immediately as a first course with crusty bread.
